title: Event hard-delete endpoint has no role check
actual: Any authenticated tenant user (viewer/analyst) can hard-delete
impact: Irreversible data loss by low-privilege user
recommended_action: Gate DELETE behind requireAdmin + reason + confirmation

title: Event hard-delete writes no audit log
evidence: No writeAuditLog call in DELETE handler
actual: No audit_log row recorded on deletion
impact: No forensic trail for irreversible action

title: Event hard-delete is immediate with no soft-delete/recovery
evidence: events table has no deleted_at; DELETE does cascade immediately
recommended_action: Add events.deleted_at; soft-delete first; async hard delete after window

title: Event hard-delete leaves orphan risk_profile_exclusions
evidence: risk_profile_exclusions.source_id has no FK; only tenant cascade
actual: Dangling exclusion rows remain pointing at deleted source_id
impact: Orphan rows; harmless to display but data hygiene/audit gap
recommended_action: Delete or tombstone matching exclusion rows in deletion transaction

title: No UI control to delete an event
evidence: grep finds no caller of DELETE /api/events/:id; only exclusion DELETE exists
expected: Permanent-delete action available to authorized users
actual: Endpoint exists but is unreachable from UI
impact: Feature effectively NOT IMPLEMENTED for users
recommended_action: Implement guarded delete UX (see UX contract) once backend is safe

title: Executive report uses 100% demo data
evidence: Imports demoAnalyses/demoCorrectiveActions/... and renders counts from them
actual: Fictitious numbers shown as executive report
impact: Misleading executive metrics; parity break vs dashboard
recommended_action: Wire to /api/risk-profile or mark clearly as sample-only

title: Per-event report silently falls back to demo data
evidence: setDataMode('demo') on error or missing analysis (lines 88/98)
actual: Shows fictitious analysis as if a report
impact: Demo content can be mistaken for real
recommended_action: Replace demo fallback with explicit empty/error state

title: Events list and Dashboard count different universes
evidence: /events returns legacy events only; risk-profile unifies legacy+vNext
actual: Dashboard 'Universo canônico' can exceed Events list count
impact: User confusion about true event count
recommended_action: Surface vNext analyses in events view or label scopes explicitly

title: Admin stats total_analyses excludes vNext
evidence: Counts from legacy analyses table only

title: /admin middleware never blocks non-admins
evidence: middleware returns NextResponse.next() in all branches incl. role!=='admin'
actual: No-op edge guard; relies on client redirect + requireAdmin
impact: Defense-in-depth gap (not an exploit: APIs are requireAdmin-gated)
recommended_action: Either enforce redirect in middleware or remove dead logic

title: vNext analyses cannot be hard-deleted at DB level
evidence: append-only triggers raise on DELETE of revisions/events; cascade from analyses would fire them
actual: Hard delete of a vNext analysis row is blocked by triggers
impact: No way to purge vNext data even if required (e.g. LGPD erasure)
recommended_action: Decide retention/erasure policy; add controlled purge function bypassing triggers via service role

title: Event-detail polling uses stale closure
evidence: setInterval checks event?.status but event is captured at mount; deps=[id]
actual: Interval reads stale event; refresh-on-processing may not fire reliably
recommended_action: Use ref or include status in deps

title: Spec routes /analyze /reports /companies /tenants absent
recommended_action: Document canonical routes; no action required

title: No automated deletion test coverage
evidence: No test references event delete / hard delete; only exclusion + beta trials
impact: Regressions in deletion would go undetected
recommended_action: Add deletion contract + cascade + tenant-isolation tests before shipping

title: Storage cleanup only covers legacy analysis file
actual: Only the single source document path is removed
impact: Orphaned objects if other artifacts ever added
recommended_action: Centralize storage GC in deletion service; verify object exists

title: Exclusion actions are admin-only but exclusion is the only lifecycle control on events
expected: Clear role model for event lifecycle
actual: Non-admins cannot exclude; nobody can delete via UI
recommended_action: Define role matrix for exclude/archive/delete (see security model)

title: window.confirm/prompt used for destructive-ish exclusion flow
actual: Native browser dialogs; no validation/UX polish
impact: Inconsistent UX; not acceptable for hard delete
recommended_action: Replace with in-app modal (mandatory for deletion)
